description_long: This is a round, shallow picnic basket with a wide, open top and a single, sturdy arched handle. The basket is constructed from tightly woven natural fibers, likely wicker or rattan, giving it a rustic and traditional appearance. The weave is consistent and uniform, with a slightly glossy finish that highlights the natural color variations of the material. The base of the basket is flat and appears to be reinforced with a lighter, possibly wooden or plywood insert for added stability. There are no visible lids, clasps, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The handle is integrated into the rim, rising smoothly in a gentle arc for easy carrying.
description: A round, shallow wicker picnic basket with a single arched handle and a flat, reinforced base. The basket features a tight, natural fiber weave and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open, round basket with the arched handle and the flat, light-colored base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness and curvature of the handle, as well as the depth of the basket's body.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, again showing the open basket and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the handle's arc and basket depth visible.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed arched handle, woven from the same material as the basket, integrated into the rim.
attribute_weave_pattern: Plain, tight weave with consistent spacing and a natural, rustic appearance.
